prompt: Run Stage 4 solution design on the dashboard performance optimization task. Stage 3 is complete. Design the implementation for full-stack optimization.

assertions.text: implementation-design.md created with all required template sections
change-map.md created with files from both backend (internal/analytics/, internal/clickhouse/, internal/cache/) and frontend (apps/dashboard/)
Implementation approach addresses the 3-layer optimization: backend parallelization, caching with singleflight, and frontend progressive loading
change-map.md includes the retention cohort bug fix at queries.go:67-85
Design decisions include: errgroup vs goroutine management, cache TTL strategy per chart type, singleflight integration point, downsampling algorithm choice
Implementation sequence starts with backend changes before frontend to allow incremental validation
Risk zones include connection pool sizing and thundering herd scenarios with specific mitigations
design-review-package.md presents approval points about cache TTL values and downsampling thresholds
